# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.external-service.com
  addresses:
  - 203.0.113.0/24
  ports:
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
  resolution: DNS
  endpoints:
  - address: api.external-service.com

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.external-database.com
  addresses:
  - 203.0.113.1/32
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: tcp
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  endpoints:
  - address: db.external-database.com

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-api-routing
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.external-service.com
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: api.external-service.com
        port:
          number: 80

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-database-routing
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.external-database.com
  tcp:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: db.external-database.com
        port:
          number: 5432
